properties.property: INSERT INTO td_data_permission_policy ( policy_id, policy_name, policy_type, resource, policy_condition, created_time, created_by ) VALUES ( #[policyId], #[policyName], #[policyType], #[resource], #[policyCondition], #[createdTime], #[createdBy] )
UPDATE td_data_permission_policy SET policy_name = #[policyName], policy_type = #[policyType], resource = #[resource], policy_condition = #[policyCondition] WHERE policy_id = #[policyId]

INSERT INTO td_data_permission_policy( policy_id, policy_name, policy_type, resource, policy_condition, created_time, created_by ) VALUES ( #[policyId], #[policyName], #[policyType], #[resource], #[policyCondition], #[createdTime], #[createdBy] )
UPDATE td_data_permission_policy SET policy_name = #[policyName], policy_type = #[policyType], resource = #[resource], policy_condition = #[policyCondition] WHERE policy_id = #[policyId]

SELECT * FROM td_data_permission_policy WHERE 1=1 #if($policyType != null && $policyType != '') AND policy_type = #[policyType] #end #if($resource != null && $resource != '') AND resource = #[resource] #end ORDER BY created_time DESC
